Agent records

Concepts7 Decisions11 Devlog14 Notes3 Symbols7 Links2

Make generated sites project-first

Render generated sites as the user project wiki first: use project identity in titles and navigation, keep only a small Created with Wikiwiki footer credit, add a curated Guides page and homepage ranking, hide empty categories from primary navigation, move record metadata into agent details, support .wikiwiki/site-theme.json, and add print/mobile polish.

Home / Decisions
Decision siteuxhuman-wikithemehomepage

Context

PRISM dogfooding showed the generated site was mechanically sound but still felt like a Wikiwiki-branded record browser, with generator branding, raw IDs, visible confidence badges, empty categories, and implementation churn on the homepage.

Decision

Render generated sites as the user project wiki first: use project identity in titles and navigation, keep only a small Created with Wikiwiki footer credit, add a curated Guides page and homepage ranking, hide empty categories from primary navigation, move record metadata into agent details, support .wikiwiki/site-theme.json, and add print/mobile polish.

Consequences

Humans get a clearer reader journey while agents retain JSONL records, generated Markdown, searchable record pages, metadata, and deterministic static output.

  • src/core/config.ts
